real_questions.text: Walk us through your maturity ladder over the next five years and your demonstrated access to capital markets — recent deals, banking relationships.
What is your office exposure, and what is your plan for that segment?

strong_answer_markers.text: Walks in with the maturity ladder, demonstrated market access (recent transactions, banking relationships), and — if office-exposed — a direct answer on that segment.

agency_intel.text: REIT refinancing risk: five-year maturities for US and Canadian equity REITs have climbed modestly, and the pull-forward effect increases refinancing risk specifically for speculative-grade REITs — expect this to be a primary line of questioning. Office REITs remain the largest pocket of weakness.
